title: doritis gibbosa
intro: Doritis gibbosa, also known as the golden orchid or Doritis, is a type of flowering orchid native to tropical Asia, characterized by its bright yellow or golden flowers. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve fever, and treat respiratory issues. The health benefits of Doritis gibbosa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe sore throats, reduce swelling, and prevent infections. Traditionally, the herbal preparation of Doritis gibbosa involves boiling the roots and leaves in water or using it as a decoction to make a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
